Class BitcoinNode

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.node.Node
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.node.PoWNode
dom.institution.lab.cns.bitcoin.node.BitcoinNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.node.IMiner, dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.node.INode
public class BitcoinNode extends dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.node.PoWNode
Represents a node in the simulated Bitcoin network. Each BitcoinNode maintains its own Blockchain and transaction pool, and participates in the mining and transaction propagation processes through a configurable NodeBehaviorStrategy.

This class extends PoWNode and provides Bitcoin-specific behavior such as proof-of-work mining thresholds, transaction validation, and blockchain reporting.

Responsibilities:

  • Maintain local blockchain and mining pool state
  • Delegate event handling to its configured NodeBehaviorStrategy
  • Interface with Reporter and BitcoinReporter for simulation reporting
See Also:
  • PoWNode
  • NodeBehaviorStrategy
  • Blockchain

  • Constructor Details

    • BitcoinNode

      public BitcoinNode(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.Simulation sim)
      Constructs a new BitcoinNode without setting behavior strategy.
      Parameters:
      sim - the Simulation instance to which this node belongs

    • BitcoinNode

      public BitcoinNode(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.Simulation sim, NodeBehaviorStrategy behaviorStrategy)
      Constructs a new BitcoinNode with a specified behavior strategy.
      Parameters:
      sim - the Simulation instance to which this node belongs
      behaviorStrategy - the NodeBehaviorStrategy defining how this node behaves

    • BitcoinNode

      public BitcoinNode()
      DO NOT USE.

  • Method Details

    • setBehaviorStrategy

      public void setBehaviorStrategy(NodeBehaviorStrategy strategy)
      Sets the node's NodeBehaviorStrategy, e.g., Honest or Malicious.
      Parameters:
      strategy - the behavior strategy to assign

    • getBehaviorStrategy

      public NodeBehaviorStrategy getBehaviorStrategy()
      Returns the node's current NodeBehaviorStrategy.
      Returns:
      the behavior strategy, or null if not set

      public void setMinValueToMine(long minValueToMine)
      Sets the minimum total transaction value required to start mining.
      Parameters:
      minValueToMine - new threshold value

    • getMinValueToMine

      public long getMinValueToMine()

    • setMinSizeToMine

      public void setMinSizeToMine(long minSizeToMine)
      Sets the minimum total transaction size (in TODO units) required for this node to consider mining a new block.

      If the sum of the transactions in the mining pool is below this threshold, the node will not attempt mining.

    • getMinSizeToMine

      public long getMinSizeToMine()
